cards.title: Welcome & sign in
Create your workspace
cards.notes: Show the empty state first (it's honest and relatable), then create the workspace live. Name it after the customer so the rest of the demo feels bespoke.

cards.title: Invite a teammate
cards.notes: Collaboration is the hook for most SaaS buyers. Send one invite and call out that seats are self-serve. Don't dwell — this is a 20-second beat.

snippets.label: Invite message
snippets.content: Hey — added you to the {{customer}} workspace so we can set this up together.

cards.title: Connect a data source
cards.notes: This is the "aha" moment: real data flowing in. Connect the source, show the sync status go green. Have the connection string on the clipboard so there's zero fumbling.

cards.title: See your first insight
cards.notes: Pay off the data connection immediately. Open the auto-generated dashboard and narrate one number that would matter to {{customer}}. End on the value, not the UI.

cards.title: Next steps
cards.notes: Recap the three things they just did: created a workspace, connected data, saw an insight. Offer the obvious next action (start a trial / book a rollout call) and open the floor for questions.
